headlines.description: — Coby White scored 24 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 19 and the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 124-102 on Sunday night to split a home-and-home set.

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant had 18 points and moved into sixth place on the NBA's career points list, and Jabari Smith Jr. scored a season-high 32 points as the Houston Rockets beat the New Orleans Pelicans 119-110 Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durant passes Nowitzki for 6th place on NBA career scoring list as Rockets beat Pelicans 119-110

headlines.description: — Brandon Miller scored 23 points, Tidjane Salaun came off the bench for 13 points and 11 rebounds, and the Charlotte Hornets blew past the injury-depleted Denver Nuggets 110-87 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brandon Miller scores 23 to lead Hornets over injury-depleted Nuggets 110-87

headlines.description: — Deni Avdija had 26 points, eight assists and eight rebounds in his return from a back injury to help the Portland Trail Blazers beat the Sacramento Kings 117-110 on Sunday night.

events.name: Toronto Raptors at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 25 points and seven assists, LeBron James added 24 points and seven assists, and the Los Angeles Lakers returned to form with a 110-93 victory over the Toronto Raptors on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka, LeBron get the Lakers back into form in a 110-93 victory over the Raptors
